CONTENT.Career: Deocleciano started his career with Vila Nova, playing for them in the Campeonato Goiano in 2018. In June 2019, he joined Croatian First Football League side NK Lokomotiva on an initial one-year loan deal. On 4 August 2019, he made his professional debut as a substitute in a 3–0 loss to Hajduk Split. Deocleciano's deal with Lokomotiva was later made permanent and in February 2020, he was loaned out to Virsliga side Rīgas FS.

SUMMARY: Emerson Santana Deocleciano (born 27 July 1999), sometimes known as Baiano, is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Rīgas FS.
